programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'octopus', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different octopuses; an orange octopus, a giant octopus and even a clever octopus!
It's Time for a Dance Class: JoJo is excited to be going to her dance class with Gran Gran. On the way, they meet Bonnie and Henry.
It's Time to Make Shadow Puppets: JoJo and Gran Gran are ready to watch a Captain Chloe film, when suddenly the lights go off!
Cucumber: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Cucumber performing Cool Under Pressure while trying to not let any obstacle ruin her calm routine.
Orange: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the daring Orange attempting to cross the stage on a tightrope, if she manages to ignore any distractions.
Séamus resumes the role of Sherlock Bones to help Mrs O find out who is playing chalky tricks.
When Oona and Isabelle go to get a glimpse of a Cattle Egret, Baba discovers a whole new small world along the way.
Isabelle and Oona call in to see Mossy, to find him not there and Oona is worried, so they enlist Flynne to help them look.
Doodle Girl helps her new friend Horse-Horse prepare for a unicorn talent show, discovering along the way that being yourself is one of the coolest talents there is!
The Happy Hat Adventure: The MixMups mix up a 'Happy Hat' adventure to find a hat that will cheer up Giggle. But when Giggle keeps the hat to herself, it soon loses it magic.
Vida's Valentine Delay: As Vida and Popcorn are heading home for their Valentine's tradition, new patients pop up!
Sunny's Germy Hands: When Sunny gets a tummy ache from not washing his hands, Vida helps AND teaches him about germs!
Big Foot: After discovering giant footprints in the woods, the Dream Factory Crew goes on an adventurous search for the mythical 'Bigfoot' creature.
Great Adventure Rally: Ms Kashani leads a road rally where the Dream Factory Crew get to demonstrate their navigation skills.
Mandy is looking after James and Sarah's guinea pig, Norris. But when Norris escapes, in the ensuing chaos, Mandy accidentally starts a fire.
The Pioneers work on Annie's farm, but Sarah accidentally lets the sheep go loose. They knock over Annie's stove which starts a fire.
Joe & Ozzy are going to the Fire Station to make some deliveries. (SL)
Joe & Ozzy are going to the Doctor's Office to make some very special deliveries. (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Farmers Market on Wheels: Nia has been hard at work organising the Autumn Farmer's Market at Whistling Woods Station for the human citizens of Sodor.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: The Smells of Sodor: Thomas is tapped to deliver a sealed, sweet-smelling boxcar. When he loses that boxcar, Thomas and his friends must use their sense of smell to track it down again.
Andy And The Grasshopper Mouse: Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to the Sonoran desert in America in search of a mystery sound and the animal that made it.
Punky wants to dance. But first Mum tells her to brush her hair, then Cranky tells her to get a blanket and then Con tells her to help with his homework.
Níl an ubh órga ar an liosta siopadóireachta inniu, rud a chuireann díomá ar Hugo agus Sonia.
Níl Sonia ná Hugo in ann dul chomh fada le barr an phictiúir chun scamaill a phéinteáil, an bhfaighidh siad bealach éigin?
Lily invites a friendly seal to the Cockle Cafe and uses the pencil she found on the beach to take his order.
Lily finds a glass jar washed up on the beach, which Salty tells her is just perfect for rockpool dipping. Lily finds Snippy, an adorable hermit crab, and they become good friends.
Pre-animation series following a little girl called Mya, who has a lot of infectious enthusiasm a fearless sense of adventure and shouts catchphrases such as Mya Go! and Maya Play!.

The speeding up and slowing down of the wind enables Nora to have much fun. Animation about the adventures of two sisters at a seaside camping park.
The sun is drying up the water so Nelly and Nora make a rockpool rescue.
Nanni and Kiva are helping Saul search for his pet snake. They need to find him as he's the mascot for the local St. Patrick's Day parade. But where would a snake hide out?
The Wee Littles decide to build a cup for Mr Robin using forest rubbish!!

MeMo and BaBa discover that sometimes all you need is a hug to make things better.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
The Little Fox: Tiny Toot, Pixie and Gato meet a young fox pup who can't find its way home. They help it find its way home by using Pixie's animal compass.
Mushroom Magic: A couple of little mushroom fairies put on a magic show for Tiny Toot and her friends.
Punky realises how important brushing your teeth is when she gets confronted by Cranky's teeth.
Barky Boats: Bluey and Mackenzie are excited to spend time with their two buddies Mia and Captain. When the older kids run off to play together, Calypso explains that growing up can be hard.
Dylan the Florist wants to make the best bouquet ever, but when one of his customers wants the rarest flower in the world... FLOWER EXPEDITION!
Dylan the Librarian wants to host story time at his library, but when the story time book gets damaged, he'll have to get creative.
Mum Tiger is working but Daniel really wants her to play with him. She explains to Daniel that she is busy. He learns that he can have fun on his own by using his imagination.
Oxygen, Nitrogen & Carbon attempt to pitch a tent but when the incomprehensible instructions are destroyed, they are forced to improvise.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'd', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We dabble with dice, drive a digger and dance with a disco dinosaur!
The Go Jetters arrive at the Bonneville Salt Flats in Utah, USA, a huge dry lakebed that is perfect for high-speed driving.
Ricky's Fired Up Part 2: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.
All Game and No Play: Oswaldo goes to a video game rental place for the first time.
Beginner's Death: Oswaldo and Tobias decide to play Iaser tag at a very rundown place downtown.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: The Fur Taxi Party: Fur Taxi is throwing quite a party, because they're turning one year old!
The Duck Badge: Energetic animation for children aged two to five, following Duggee the dog and his Squirrel Club
The Tooth Brushing Badge: Duggee and the Squirrels meet a lion with unfortunate breath and teach him a special song to help him learn how to brush his teeth.
When Sonia can't go as fast as her family on her rollerskates, she realises that learning at her own pace will also get her there. (SL)
Drawing a fluttering butterfly proves tricky for Sonia and Hugo until they learn there are different ways to make art. (SL)
Joe leaves the depot with a sore tooth but luckily his deliveries today are at the dentist. (SL)
The Little Fox: Tiny Toot, Pixie and Gato meet a young fox pup who can't find its way home. They help it find its way home by using Pixie's animal compass.
Mushroom Magic: A couple of little mushroom fairies put on a magic show for Tiny Toot and her friends.
Punky realises how important brushing your teeth is when she gets confronted by Cranky's teeth.
Farmyard Runaways: Plom is looking after a herd of alpacas, but when they wander off, can Plom find a way to get them back.
Henry meets a skateboard at a skate park where an extreme sports competition is taking place. Skateboard is keen to take part but his skater is injured!
Where is My Home?: The Game Catchers arrive on the Underwater Planet and play 'Follow The Clue', until they're interrupted by a lost turtle who can't seem to find her way home!
The Musical Cow: The Game Catchers land on a cartoon-like planet and make friends with two nice alien kids: Toby and Penny.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Bruno To The Rescue: When Thomas accidentally leaves behind part of his train, and Bruno is the only one around, it's up to Bruno to get it to its destination on time.
King wants a new coat of arms and decides to organise a design competition. Mouse and Dragon both participate. And of course Mouse HAS to win!
While watching bats return home, Hamish notices the cave is very dark and wonders how bats see in the dark.
Brewster, Maggie and Hamish wonder 'Where does the sky end?' Brewster takes them to outer space where they meet Zippy Meteor who can help.
Tá Peppa agus George ag imirt cluichí paraisiúit ag an ngrúpa spraoi lena gcairde ar fad.
Bíonn lá iontach ag Peppa agus George in éineacht le Mummy agus Daddy ag caitheamh agus ag breith ar dhioscaí sa bpáirc.
Ciorcail agus Crosa: Téann Breacaí ar fhoireann Chiorcail agus Crosa i gcluiche ceannais an domhain. Caithfidh sí an cluiche a fhoghlaim go tapa le cuidiú lena cairde nua chun an bua a fháil.
Loch Meáin: Téann Breacaí ar thuras báid le dobharchú slítheánta chun Ollphéist Loch Meáin, créatúr miotaseolaíochta déanta as bláthanna triomaithe, a aimsiú.
Réaltaí Reatha: Tá an spéir lán de réaltaí reatha anocht. Sceitimíní ar achan chréatúr seachas Silky, nach bhfuíll róchinnte go dtaitneoidh siad léi. Socraíonn Oona í a chur ar a suaimhneas.
Taispeántas na snáthaidí móra.: Is breá le Otto na snáthaidí móra agus is é a mhian a dtaispeántas aeir a thaispeáint.
The Egg: The little owl's parents drop him off at Forest Camp where he learns one of the most important lessons for a bird, caring for an egg.
Kenny Keeps His Cool: Whilst playing hide and seek, Kenny enters a cave he had never seen before and falls into a hole. He soon finds himself in a dark forest without sunlight.
Andy Day attempts to catch the breed of dragonfly that a baby Allosaurus hunts and eats, and watches as more hatch from their eggs and take their first steps.
Ricky's Fired Up Part 2: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.
